mean_en: to make an opening or a wound in something, especially with a sharp tool such as a knife or scissors;  to remove something or a part of something, using a knife, etc.; to make or form something by removing material with a knife, etc.; to divide something into two or more pieces with a knife, etc.; to make something shorter by cutting
sentence: The budget for the company has been cut since winter began.
sentence_trans: 自冬天开始以来，公司的预算就被削减了。
